message:
Running command: # Now wait for librelane PID 214817 to exit - using wait in a shell
# Use a simple polling approach with 30-minute intervals and 12-hour max
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  # Wait 30 minutes
  sleep 1800
  
  echo "=== [$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Check $i/24 ==="
  
  # Check if librelane is done
  LR_PIDS=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -z "$LR_PIDS" ]; then
    echo "LibreLane has EXITED!"
    echo ""
    echo "=== Run directory ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
    echo ""
    echo "=== Last 60 lines of log ==="
    tail -60 "$MAIN_LOG"
    break
  fi
  
  # Still running - show progress from monitor
  echo "LibreLane still running (PIDs: $(echo $LR_PIDS | tr '\n' ' '))"
  echo "Latest monitor status:"
  tail -3 /tmp/wrapper_monitor.log 2>/dev/null
  echo ""
done

done", "timeout": 50000}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
